unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: How do we keep fit?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法：费特（太胖了费特，所以要fit保持健康）

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Write the sports items in the box under the pictures. baseball
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀法：base(基础/垒) + ball(球) -> 打垒的球 -> 棒球

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Whose baseball glove is it?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法：在love（爱）前面加g（给），用手套给你带来温暖的爱。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: exercise mat
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法：迈特（迈着特别的步伐走在运动垫子上）

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: jump rope
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法：肉铺（肉铺里挂着用粗绳子拴着的肉）

unit_vocabulary.meaning: 跳绳用的绳子;跳绳(运动)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: jump rope
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法：组合词 jump(跳) + rope(绳) -> 跳绳

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Whose tennis racket is it? How do you know?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀法：rack(架子) + -et(小的后缀) -> 小架子一样的网 -> 球拍

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Emma: Hardly ever.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀法：hard(困难地) + -ly -> 困难到几乎不可能发生 -> 几乎不

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Emma: Hardly ever.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法：把never(从不)的n拿掉，就变成了在任何时候(ever)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Emma: Hardly ever.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法：hardly(几乎不) + ever(曾经) -> 几乎曾经没有过 -> 几乎从不

unit_vocabulary.meaning: 一次;曾经 / conj. 一旦
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Peter: once or twice at weekends
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法：由数字one演变而来，表示一次。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Peter: once or twice at weekends
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法：以tw-开头，和two(二)同源，表示两次。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: No, it isn't mine.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法：my(我的)的绝对物主代词形式，表示“我的东西”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: No, hers is at home.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀法：her(她的) + s(名词性物主代词后缀) -> 她的东西

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Maybe it's Yaming's.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀法：合成词 may(可能) + be(是) -> 也许是

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Your bat looks well-used.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法：合成词 well(好地/充分地) + used(被使用的) -> 使用得多的

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Well, practice makes perfect.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法：扑克提示（玩扑克需要提示来多加practice练习）

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Well, practice makes perfect.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀法：per-(完全) + fect(做) -> 做到完全的程度 -> 完美的

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I seldom do, but I often play badminton.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法：很少(seldom)出售(sell)它们(them)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I seldom do, but I often play badminton.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法：白打明顿（白白打了一顿羽毛球）

unit_vocabulary.meaning: 双打(doubles);两倍 / adj.成双的;两倍的
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We should all play doubles sometime!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀法：dou-(表示二的词根) -> 变成双倍的

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We should all play doubles sometime!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法：合成词 some(某个) + time(时间) -> 在某个时候

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: volleyball
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法：合成词 volley(凌空截击) + ball(球) -> 截击不让球落地的运动 -> 排球

unit_vocabulary.meaning: 他们的,她们的,它们的(所有物)
unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: No, they're not theirs.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀法：their(他们的) + s(名词性物主代词后缀) -> 他们的东西

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: go swimming/jogging/...
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法：赵哥（赵哥每天早上都在jog慢跑）

unit_vocabulary.meaning: (表示否定的)很少的;几乎没有的
unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: a few times
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法：飞舞（落叶很少，只剩几片在空中飞舞）

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: a few times/three times/only once or twice
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法：加上了a就代表肯定，有“几个”，比few(几乎没有)要多一点。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Excuse me, is this your ...?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀法：ex-(向外) + cuse(理由) -> 给出理由去开脱 -> 原谅

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Excuse me, is this your ...?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 情境记忆法：打扰别人或引起注意时的常用礼貌用语。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Yours are right here. Mine are over there.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 方位联想法：over(跨越过去) + there(那里) -> 距离较远的“那边”

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It looks just like mine!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法：就（just）是正好这样！

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Who does this T-shirt belong to?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 象形记忆法：短袖衣服平铺开的形状就像英文字母“T”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Who does this T-shirt belong to?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀法：be-(使) + long(长久) -> 长久跟着你 -> 属于

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Who does this T-shirt belong to?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 搭配记忆法：belong后固定接介词to来引出所有者。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I seldom jog in the afternoon on working days because I'm busy then.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀法：work(工作) + -ing(形容词后缀) -> 工作的

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I seldom jog in the afternoon on working days because I'm busy then.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法：工作(working)的每一天(day) -> 工作日

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I'm always full of energy after jogging.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法：容器装满(full)了某种东西(of) -> 充满

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I'm always full of energy after jogging.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀法：en-(在里面) + erg(工作) + -y(名词后缀) -> 在体内支撑工作的源泉 -> 能量/精力

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: In our group, many students like to do sport and exercise.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法：骨肉铺（骨肉铺前面聚集了一大“群”人）

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: My skateboard is really cool, and so are theirs.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法：组合词 skate(滑冰/滑行) + board(板) -> 可以滑行的板 -> 滑板

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We encourage one another to do tricks.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀法：en-(使...) + courage(勇气) -> 使人有勇气 -> 鼓励

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We encourage one another to do tricks.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法：吹客（变戏法的人在台上吹嘘自己的trick技巧）

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Some tricks are difficult, but once you succeed, you feel great!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀法：suc-(在下面/向下) + ceed(走) -> 一直往下走坚持到底 -> 就会成功

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I like skateboarding very much.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀法：skateboard(滑板) + -ing(动名词后缀表运动项目) -> 滑板运动

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: This year, my goal is to be really fit.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法：够（跳一跳就能够得着的东西，就是你的goal目标）

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I jog, swim, and do sit-ups.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 动作联想法：从平躺的状态sit(坐) -> up(起来) -> 仰卧起坐

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: But my favourite way of keeping fit is to use an exercise app to work out.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法：在健身房通过work(努力练习)把汗水排out(出来) -> 锻炼身体

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The app gives me exercises to do every day.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 字母记忆法：是application(应用程序)的前三个字母缩写。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It can show my progress.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀法：pro-(向前) + gress(走) -> 不断向前走 -> 进步

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We play many matches.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法：卖车（比赛赢了奖品可以去卖车）

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The other teams are great, but I think ours is the best!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法：替木（替木头人组队去参赛）

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The other teams are great, but I think ours is the best!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀法：our(我们的) + s(名词性物主代词后缀) -> 我们的东西

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We work as a team, and we win or lose as a team.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法：路子（比赛用错了路子，自然就会lose输掉）

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: A website wants to learn more about how teenagers keep fit.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀法：teen(后缀-teen表示十几) + age(年龄) + -er(人) -> 年龄在十几岁的人 -> 青少年

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Steve
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 音译法：英文常见男生名直接音译。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: How do we keep fit?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 语境记忆法：本单元标题核心短语，keep(保持) + fit(健康的)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I play it twice a week, usually at weekends.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 结构记忆法：介词at + 周末复数形式weekends，表示常规性在周末发生的活动。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Swimming is good for me because it keeps me healthy.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 反义词联想法：be good for (对...有益) 对应 be bad for (对...有害)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Find out which is the most popular sport or exercise...
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法：通过寻找(find)最终让真相水落石出(out) -> 查明事实。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: But we should try our best to exercise every day.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 搭配记忆法：try one's best (尽某人最大努力)，在这里物主代词替换为our。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: When we play a sport with others, we can even make new friends.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法：制造(make)出新的友谊，即交朋友(friends要用复数)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: So, when you have trouble with your homework, do some exercise, then try again!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语拆解法：有(have) + 麻烦/困难(trouble) + 伴随着某事(with)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Our brain gets more oxygen because of this...
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词性对比法：because(连词，后接句子) vs because of (介词短语，后接名词/代词)。
